guest_john-cutler: Man in his 40s-50s with short cropped salt-and-pepper hair, rectangular dark-framed glasses, light stubble, fair skin, wearing a casual blue zip-up hoodie, meeting the camera with a thoughtful, quietly intense direct gaze.
